instructions:
This is AgentBase — a Next.js 15 + Supabase task orchestration platform. Key rules:
- Always run `npx tsc --noEmit` before committing. Fix all type errors.
- API auth uses `Authorization: Bearer <key>`, never X-API-Key.
- Task create: POST /api/commands/create-task. Task update: POST /api/commands/update-task with {id: UUID, fields: {...}}.
- Never use service_role key. All DB ops go through anon key + RLS or SECURITY DEFINER RPCs.
- Migrations are run manually by Hunter in Supabase SQL editor — create the file and flag it.
- Do not call router.refresh() in real-time handlers.
- Soft delete only (deleted_at timestamp) for CRM and library entities.
